candidate_definition_hints.text: Emoji/Unicode Icons Theme for Vim and Neovim with support for 40+ plugins and 380+ filetypes 🎨💙💛🤍💚
This plugin uses emojis to represent filetypes, signs and symbols for many plugins. So there is no need for overrided fonts.
